notes: Server-based published-applications platform; later renamed Presentation Server, then XenApp; lineage continues to Citrix Virtual Apps
Original 1997 agreement paid Citrix $175M in royalties; expired 2002
New deal: continued Microsoft code access at no cost — different model than royalty-based 1997 deal
Citrix's core thesis; descendants include VDI, DaaS, ZTNA, Microsoft AVD, VMware Horizon
Application execution on central server; client device is display-only; foundational to Citrix's products
